caption: A one-shoulder, sleeveless top with a single thin strap on the left side, featuring a ruched fit and a gathered waistline. The fabric is lightweight and stretchy, adorned with a vibrant floral print in blue, pink, green, and black, with flowers of various sizes scattered across the entire surface.

One-shoulder crop top with a single thin strap on the left side, no closure, fitted silhouette, ruched at the center front, made from lightweight stretchy fabric, featuring a vibrant floral print in shades of pink, red, orange, and white, with large and small flowers scattered across the entire surface.

A one-shoulder, sleeveless top with a ruched, fitted silhouette. The fabric is a deep burgundy with a bold, abstract red floral pattern, primarily concentrated on the left side and extending across the front. The right shoulder is bare, while the left shoulder features a single, short strap. The neckline is asymmetrical, dipping lower on the left side. The material appears smooth and slightly stretchy, clinging to the body.

One-shoulder crop top with a single spaghetti strap on the left side, featuring a ruched bust and a wrap-style front. The fabric is lightweight and slightly sheer, with a vibrant floral print in shades of pink, red, orange, and white, set against a light pink background. The pattern consists of large, abstract flowers and smaller, scattered floral motifs, distributed evenly across the entire surface.

A one-shoulder, sleeveless top with a ruched, fitted silhouette. The fabric is a smooth, stretchy material in a deep burgundy base with a large, abstract red floral pattern. The single shoulder strap is wide and features a small, matching red accent.

A one-shoulder, sleeveless top with a single asymmetrical strap on the left side, featuring a gathered, ruched fit at the waist. The fabric is lightweight and slightly stretchy, adorned with a vibrant floral print in blue, pink, green, and brown hues, with flowers of various sizes scattered across a light yellow background.
